hero.headline:
Reliable local service,
done right the first time.
hero.description: Experienced technicians, transparent pricing, and easy online booking — guaranteed.

servicesPreview.title: Services built for homes & businesses
servicesPreview.subtitle: From quick fixes to full installations, our certified pros handle the work so you don't have to.

whyChooseUs.title: Local pros you can actually trust
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We've earned our reputation one job at a time. Here's what sets us apart.

items.title: Fast Response
items.description: Same-day appointments and rapid dispatch when you need us most.

items.title: Transparent Pricing
items.description: Upfront quotes with no surprise fees — ever. Just honest work.

items.title: Professional Team
items.description: Background-checked, licensed pros who treat your space like their own.

items.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
items.description: Not happy? We'll make it right or your money back, no questions asked.

process.title: Simple, painless, and fast
process.subtitle: Booking service should be the easy part. Three steps and you're done.

steps.title: Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us what you need in 60 seconds — online, by phone, or text.

steps.title: Schedule Service
steps.description: Pick a time that works. We confirm with a reminder before we arrive.

steps.title: Get It Done
steps.description: Our team shows up on time, works clean, and leaves you smiling.

serviceArea.title: Proudly serving your neighborhood
serviceArea.subtitleTemplate: Headquartered in {primary} and serving the surrounding communities.
serviceArea.footerNote: Don't see your area? Give us a call — we often serve nearby towns by request.

ctaBanner.title: Ready for service done right?
ctaBanner.description: Book online in 60 seconds or call now to speak with a real person. Free quotes, transparent pricing, no pressure.
